name: Green Tomato Soup with Garlic~ Ginger~ Cumin
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 pounds Green tomatoes - peel and seed, then chop
1 medium Green bell pepper - core and seed, then chop
1 small Red pepper - fresh or dry, hot
1/2 cup Unsweetened canned coconut milk - or skim milk
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large heavy pot, heat the oil over medium heat. Add the onions, ginger, garlic, coriander, and cumin. Cook, stirring until the onions are soft and translucent, about 5 minutes.
2. Add the tomatoes, bell pepper, potatoes, broth, honey, and hot pepper to the pot. Bring to a boil, then reduce the heat to low. Simmer, covered, for 30 minutes.
3. Remove the hot pepper from the soup.
4. Using a blender or food processor, puree the soup in batches.
5. Return the purée to the pot. Stir in the coconut milk and salt, then heat just to a simmer.
6. Serve the soup garnished with a dollop of yogurt, cashews, and cilantro.
